title: deguelia benthamii
intro: Deguelia benthamii, also known as the 'bark of the tree', is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Deguelia benthamii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting digestive health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its bark is also used to make a tea or tincture for medicinal purposes.
